scripts.setup: instance=$(basename "$PWD"); bun i && bun run gini install --instance "$instance"
scripts.remoteSetup: instance=$(basename "$PWD"); bun i && bun run gini install --instance "$instance"
scripts.archive: instance=$(basename "$PWD"); bun run gini uninstall --instance "$instance" && rm -rf node_modules "$HOME/.claude/projects/-Users-shelden-conductor-workspaces-gini-agent-$instance"
